title: mentha × vesana
intro: Mentha × vesana, also known as xiang su or wild mint, is a hybrid species of mint plants that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help in soothing digestive issues and alleviating respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha × vesana include its ability to reduce nausea and vomiting, relieve headaches and fever, and promote relaxation. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils for its therapeutic uses, and it can also be used in culinary applications to add flavor to various dishes.
